summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented. useTabs.ts now uses https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url= as the primary proxy (index 0), HomeSearch.tsx updated proxy label array so index 0 shows allorigins.win, TabContent.tsx imports isSearchEngineUrl to skip proxy for search engines, and ProxyInfoPanel.tsx reflects allorigins.win as the active proxy. The proxy-bypass logic for search engines is preserved.
